description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. The workflow has two jobs: build-windows and build-other. The build-windows job runs on a Windows environment with a matrix strategy for different OS configurations, and it uses vcpkg to install packages, restore artifacts, and build with CMake and Ninja. The build-other job runs on macOS and Linux environments, installs dependencies, creates a build environment, configures CMake, and builds the project.
